consensus.summary: VeriPatch v1.3.0 stable: all quality gates G1-G5 pass. Gap-closure complete: accessible GUI, one-click elevation, agent autonomy, and CI/CD quality gates enforced.

agents.summary: G1-G5 quality gates pass locally; CI workflows updated with compile, unit 90%+, integration, static analysis.
Static analysis and mypy issues resolved; 140 backend+integration tests passing. Recommend manual UAC smoke test on Windows before first production deploy.
production_ready=true: version 1.3.0, CHANGELOG updated, release consensus present, all documented requirements met for stable release.

next_steps: Commit to staging or main when G1 compile gate passes
Tag v1.3.0 on main after agent consensus
Manual Windows UAC smoke test for Update All
